title: Registered movables
doc_html:
Art. 525. Registered movables

            Movables required by law to be registered are subject to the provisions of this Chapter.

            Acts 1979, No. 180, §1; Acts 2023, No. 401, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 525.  Registered movables
Movables required by law to be registered are subject to the provisions of
this Chapter.
Acts 1979, No. 180, §1; Acts 2023, No. 401, §1.
